subcodes.first_line: O remnant of His Holiness, the illustrious Nabíl, that noble one who, in Iraq, was companion and intimate friend, and solace to the grieving heart [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یادگار حضرت نبیل جلیل آن بزرگوار در عراق یار و ندیم بود و مونس قلب حزین
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @consolation and comfort, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
